_comment: ChatGPT Custom Action configuration. Use this JSON when creating a GPT action in the OpenAI platform.

setup_instructions.step_1: Start Background Remover Studio API: BackgroundRemoverStudio.exe --api
setup_instructions.step_2: Expose the local server publicly using a tunnel (ngrok, Cloudflare Tunnel, etc.): ngrok http 8000
setup_instructions.step_3: In ChatGPT GPT editor → Actions → Add action → import openapi_action.yaml
setup_instructions.step_4: Replace 'http://localhost:8000' in the server URL with your tunnel URL
setup_instructions.note: For local use only (same machine), a public tunnel is not needed. The GPT can call localhost directly only if running in a local ChatGPT-compatible client.

authentication.note: The API has no authentication by default. Add an API key header if exposing publicly.

actions.name: removeBackground
actions.description: Remove the background from an image. Send the image as base64, get back a transparent PNG.

actions.name: checkHealth
actions.description: Check if the Background Remover Studio API is running.
